page_content: This is an adjustable wrench or spanner tool shown as a digital illustration. The wrench has a typical C-shaped jaw with an adjustable mechanism, colored in gray or silver tones. The style is a simplified vector graphic icon, not a photograph. There is no visible text or labels on the tool itself. This appears to be an icon or diagram type image, commonly used in software interfaces or technical documentation to represent tools, settings, or mechanical work.
